description: Archived resolved residuals from V1.30 post-QC tech-debt batch. V1.35 P0 (commits aafe1f8, 26b2fa8) closed TD-V130-02 and TD-V130-06.

entries.title: cleanup_row fire-and-forget — DELETE failure silently lost, dangling registry rows possible
entries.source: qc2 W-003, qc3 W-003 (V1.30 P0 review)
entries.target: Resolved by V1.35 P0 (commit aafe1f8) — cleanup_row now logs DELETE failures via tracing::error (added tracing dep to nexus-local-db/Cargo.toml).
entries.closure_evidence: commit aafe1f8 on feature/v1.35-critical-residual-convergence; tracing error log added to cleanup_row; clippy clean.

entries.title: mark_running lacks WHERE status guard — can revert done/failed jobs
entries.target: Resolved by V1.35 P0 (commit aafe1f8) — mark_running now has WHERE status='queued' guard, mirroring claim_job pattern.
entries.closure_evidence: commit aafe1f8 on feature/v1.35-critical-residual-convergence; kb_extract_job tests cover queued→running transition and reject done/failed.
